lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've solved your problems! I've returned the Fairy Queen's magical essence!

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Fairy Queen was in an enchanted deep sleep, because the Tanglefoot had taken the secateurs that contained her magic. I fought and killed the Tanglefoot and have given the Godfather the Fairy Queen's secateurs. She'll

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: wake up now and everything will get back to normal.

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: I'm glad to hear it, but if you don't mind I'll go and plant some seeds now and wait until they grow before I give you the reward that I promised.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess it does sound rather far-fetched. Ok, I'll come back and see you after your crops have had a chance to grow.

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: Great! I'll see you soon then.

sections.title: Talking to Martin before 5 minutes have passed

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, have your vegetables grown yet?

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: Stop being so impatient, [player name]. They'll grow in their own good time - come back later.

sections.title: Talking to Martin after 5 minutes have passed

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Martin, you must be the slowest gardener in the world! I don't suppose those crops have grown yet?

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: Well, you've got a nerve showing up around here again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: You told me that you'd solved the problems of the Gardening Group's members, well I've planted loads of seeds since then and there's no doubt that even more plants are dying!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I gave the Fairy Queen's secateurs back to the Godfather, things should be growing again.

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: Yah, sure, whatever. You know, I didn't believe you when you told me that story about 'the fairies' in the first place. You'd just better solve this problem, when people get hungry, they get angry and you're the

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: person who said that everything would be all right, so you're the person who they'll get angry with!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose I'd better go and see what the problem is then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've done enough for you, sort it out yourself!

sections.title: Talking to Martin again after starting the quest

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: Hello again, [player name]. Our crops are still failing. Please do something fast, the food reserves are starting to fail. People will start to realise that there is an imminent food crisis soon!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'm working on it.

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: Please hurry. Things are getting dire!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Godfather! Where is the Fairy Queen?

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Whata are you-a talking about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've just been to Fairy Nuff's cave and when I got there I found it ransacked! Everything has been broken and the Fairy Queen and Fairy Nuff are missing!

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Essere nel panico! You-a say datta Queen Bee, she izza meesing? Theez izza terreeble! Who could-a have done such a theeng? We musta find her! I weel organise a search-a party right-a-way!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Calm down! Let's think this through carefully.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any idea who could have done this?

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Errm...no! None atta all! Da Queen Bee, she izza well liked by-a everyone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's not very helpful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where could she have been taken to?

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Ze keednapper must-a have taken her through-a da fairyreengs. Dey weel-a be long gone by-a now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We must go after them!

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Yes! We must-a, but most-a of da folk are away from Zanaris atta the momento.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well tell me what to do and I'll go myself.

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Ye-es, dat izza good idea. Hokay, you may use-a da fairyreengs. Talk-a to da co-ordinator, she will-a explain-a to you how to use-a da reengs, but you must-a promees me dat you weel come-a back-a here, eef you

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: find-a her. Whoever keednapped her must-a be very powerful. You find-a da Queen Bee and den-a yous come right back here and we will-a rescue her together. Hokay?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, okay.

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Good. Now-a yous talk-a to da co-ordinator. She will-a tell you how-a da fairyreengs work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'll rescue her myself.

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Oh no, dat eet eez no good. Yous wanna to be da hero, but what-a about me? She izza my queen! No, no. You cannot-a use-a da fairyreengs

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where have all the fairies gone?

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Da people are mostly out-a and about-a tryeeng to keep-a theengs working. Eet izza not easy weeth da Queen Bee notta here!

sections.title: Talking to Fairy Godfather again after denying his request

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Ah, [player name], yous hassa changed your mind? Yous weel-a come and getta me before yous rescue da Queen Bee? Only den can-a I geev yous permission to use-a da reengs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, okay then.

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Good, I knew-a you would change-a your mind. Now I just-a need you to sign-a dis scroll before I geev-a yous da permission to use-a da fairyreengs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am not signing this! It says I am indebted to you until you release me!

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Eet does? Oh, sorry, must-a geeven yous da wrong-a scroll. Tell-a yous what, yous hazza da honest face, so I'll trust-a yous. Go ahead, use-a da fairyreengs, but just-a make sure dat yous come-a back here and tell-a

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: me when-a yous finda da Queen Bee, like-a yous promised. Now go-a and talk-a to da co-ordinator. She-a weel tell-a yous how da fairyreengs work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, there's no chance of that happening.

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Yous weel change-a your mind. Come and talk-a to me me yous do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, the Godfather said I should ask you to explain how the fairy rings work.

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: Goodness! As if I don't have enough to do already without giving every adventurer that comes along a history lesson! Let's get this over with quickly. Zanaris is an extremely old place, it was here long before we

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: fairyfolk came to live here. In fact it is rumoured to be the nexus of all planes. When we arrived here we found many of the magical properties of this place to be dormant. One of these was the ability to jump between

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: planes using a powerful portal that had been sealed for centuries. The Fairy Queen harnessed that magic and created the fairy rings, these are not as powerful as the original portal would have been, but are very effective

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: nonetheless. There are 3 fairy rings in Zanaris, the one in the market and the one near the evil chicken's shrine will only take users to one specific place. However the third fairy ring, near the fountains, is a major portal.

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: Anybody who activates that fairy ring will find themselves able to dial in a 3 digit code. These codes will all take the user to different locations. Some of the codes no longer work and other codes go to extremely

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: dangerous places, so be careful. Fortunately the fairy rings are imbued with a powerful protective magic and as long as you stand in the middle of them nothing will be able to attack you. Remember, because you are a

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: human, you will need to be holding your dramen staff to activate the rings. Now I must get back to work, there is so much to do and so few fairies left to do it.

lines.speaker: Fairy Fixit
lines.text: What is it, human? Busy busy busy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you carrying that toolbox?

lines.speaker: Fairy Fixit
lines.text: It's the fizgog! It's picking up cable again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, right. So is it safe to use the fairy rings then?

lines.speaker: Fairy Fixit
lines.text: Sure, as long as you have been given permission to use them. You should just be aware that using the fairy rings sometimes has strange results, the locations that you have been to may affect the locations you are

lines.speaker: Fairy Fixit
lines.text: trying to reach. I could fix it by replacing the fizgog and the whosprangit, I've put in a request for some new parts but they're pretty hard to get hold of, it seems.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm okay, thanks.

sections.title: Talking to the Fairy Godfather after getting permission to use the fairy rings

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: [player name], you are-a back! Have-a you found da Queen Bee?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err, no, not yet.

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Den whatta are you doing-a back here? Go and-a search for her!

sections.title: Using the certificate on various NPCs

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: For why you show-a me dat? I-a busy fairy! I donn-a have time for nonsense!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these strange marks mean?

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: For why you show-a me dat? Eez very nice to see yous learning to draw! Bravo!

sections.title: Any Zanaris cow but the dairy cow

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these strange marks mean?

lines.speaker: Cow
lines.text: Can't the human take a hint? I've been ignoring you! Do you think I would ignore you if I wanted to discuss your Rorschach ink-blots ?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these strange marks mean?

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: The human found some symbols And doesn't know what they mean So now it's cross-examining me And spoiling my routine!

lines.speaker: Fairy chef
lines.text: Very nice, dearie, but that belongs to Fairy Nuff. I should put it back on her wall before she misses it if I were you. You wouldn't want her to think you stole it now, would you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these strange marks mean?

lines.speaker: Fairy chef
lines.text: Sorry dearie, no, but I have seen a sign with similar marks near the mysterious ruins. You know, the ones that lead you to the Cosmic Rune Altar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these strange marks mean?

lines.speaker: Gatekeeper
lines.text: That you've been doodelling? If you don't mind I have a job to do, please stop distracting me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these strange marks mean?

lines.speaker: Gatekeeper
lines.text: No I don't and I'm trying to work here. Please stop distracting me!

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: Fairy Nuff is very proud of that certificate, it's her most prized possession. She won't like you taking it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these strange marks mean?

lines.speaker: Co-ordinator
lines.text: They look familiar, but I can't think where I've seen marks like that. Try asking around, maybe someone else will recognise them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these strange marks mean?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Thank you, [player name] but you'd better keep hold of it. You can't get to this hideout without it.

sections.title: Trying to enter the hideout with the certificate

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: I don't want to go back! That orc tried to kill me!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: We must find a way to fight back! To throw those villains out of our homes.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: I can't believe that there are orcs in Zanaris.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Have you heard? The Godfather has allowed orcs into Zanaris!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Those fairies that side with the Godfather are all traitors! The Queen is the true ruler of Zanaris!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Have you seen Fairy Cake? She went to talk to the Godfather and I haven't seen her since.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: How is the Queen? Has she woken up yet?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: [player name]! You found us! I'm so glad, I was afraid you wouldn't get my message.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fairy Nuff, what happened?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: After you brought back the Queen's enchanted secateurs and gave them to the Fairy Godfather, I went to him to ask for them so that I could wake Her Majesty up, but he refused to give them to me. Then I

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: noticed that lots of my friends were missing, when I asked him about them he said they were off working for him and then he threatened to have his bodyguards pull my wings off! I was scared for the Queen, and so I

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: moved her here.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: When I returned to Zanaris I found my cave ransacked! There were other fairies that had been attacked by the Godfather and so we fled the city and came here. I managed to hide a note that I hoped you

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: would find...

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: ... obviously you did.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But why would the Godfather do this?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Isn't it obvious? He wants to rule Zanaris instead of the Fairy Queen. The latest fairies to arrive have even reported that he has invited all sorts of monsters to the Lost City.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what should we do about it do you think?

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: I've got terrible news! One of our spies has just returned from Zanaris and has reported that the Godfather has enlisted an army of orcs! Apparently they are wandering freely around our homes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, but who are you?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Oh, how rude of me! [player name] this is Fairy Very Wise, advisor to the Queen. Fairy Very Wise, this is [player name].

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: Oh, I've heard of you. You're the young adventurer that defeated the Tanglefoot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, that's me.

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: So you're also the idiot who gave that Godfather maniac the Fairy Queen's magic secateurs!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But that was a mistake! I thought he was trying to help the Fairy Queen!

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: So you're not evil, you're just not too bright. Well I'm glad you found this place, although if you can find it it's obviously not much of a hiding place, now you can help fix the damage that you've done!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, what do I need to do?

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: The first thing we have to do is wake up the Fairy Queen. You will have to go back to Zanaris and find a way to get those magical secateurs back from the Godfather!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's easy I'll just pickpocket them off of him, I'm really good at that.

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: Ok, just be careful, his henchmen have keen eyes and will be watching out for him.

sections.title: Talking to Fairy Very Wise again

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: I'm so worried about the Queen, without her the fairy people may be chased out of Gielinor completely! You must wake her, for all our sakes!

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: What are you doing? You need to get those secateurs back very urgently!

lines.speaker: Fairy Godfather
lines.text: Rocco, teach-a thees thief a lesson!

sections.title: Returning to Fairy Nuff after losing the secateurs

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Oh, [player name], you're back! I'm so glad. Did you manage to get the secateurs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, but I seem to have lost them somewhere.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: I can't believe you did that! You know how important it is that I get those secateurs as soon as possible! Please go and find them immediately!

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Oh, [player name], you're back! I'm so glad. Did you manage to get the secateurs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You should have seen me! The Godfather didn't even know I was going through his pockets! Here they are.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Fantastic! Let's just hope that it's not too late ...

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Oh no! It didn't work! She's been asleep too long!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Calm down! There's got to be something that we can do. After all, we've given her back her magical essence, right?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Yes, we have. There is one small chance that we might be able to wake her up still, but I'd need a potion of Magic Essence.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that doesn't seem too bad, what do I need to do to make one?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: A potion of magic essence is made in the same way as any other potion, first you mix a vial of water with a base herb, in this case a Star Flower. Star Flowers are rich in magic essence and are excellent for curing

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: poisons and that's what the Queen is suffering from - a poisoning of her life essence. Then we need to add the catalyst ingredient; a powdered Gorak's claw. Goraks drain the life from their prey, so by using one of their

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: claws we are hoping to draw the Queen's life essence back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the lecture, but where do I get one of these Star Flowers and where can I find a Gorak?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Star Flowers only grow on the higher planes and even there they are extremely rare. You should be able to access some of the higher planes by using the fairy rings. Goraks also live on a different plane. They are

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: vicious creatures that draw the life essence from any living thing they find. It seems that in drawing the life force from the world that they live on they have trapped themselves on a small plane, as far as I am aware, the

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: only way onto or off of their world is through the fairy rings.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: Salutations traveller! It is unusual for one of the creatures called 'humans' to visit this plane. How can I assist you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for a Star Flower.

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: Then you've come to the right place. Star Flower, which is much prized for its magical properties, only grows on this plane. It has a very short life-span; plants grow, flower and die in the space of minutes! If you search

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: around you might find some growing somewhere.

sections.title: Talking to Fairy Nuff after visiting the Cosmic Plane and Gorak Plane

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: A potion of magic essence is made in the same way as any other potion, first you mix a vial of water with a base herb, in this case a Star Flower. Star Flowers are rich in magic essence and are excellent for curing

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: poisons and that's what the Queen is suffering from - a poisoning of her life essence. Then we need to add the catalyst ingredient; a powdered Gorak's claw. Goraks drain the life from their prey, so by using one of their

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: claws we are hoping to draw the Queen's life essence back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the lecture. Fortunately I think I know where to get all of the ingredients you need.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: That's great news! Well what are you waiting for? We need that potion as soon as possible!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm on my way.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Hello [player name]. How are you getting on with making that potion?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't found a Star Flower yet.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: I don't have to tell you again how important it is that you hurry!

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: How's that potion of Magic Essence coming along, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've half made it, I found a Starflower on this really wierd plane.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: That's nice for you, but please stop wasting time. You need to finish the potion with a Gorak's claw.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got it, I've made a potion of magic essence!

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Oh, [player name] that's fantastic! Please give it to Her Majesty immediately.

sections.title: Talking to Fairy Very Wise after curing the queen

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: Thank you for your great service to the fairy people, we are indebted to you!

sections.title: After using the magic essence potion on the Fairy Queen

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: ...Urgh! Wh... what happened? ...Why do I feel so awful?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Your majesty! You're awake!

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: Wh... what happened? The last thing I remember was confronting that Tanglefoot with the aid of the Godfather.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: THE GODFATHER?

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: Yes, that's what I said... oh, hello [player name]. Please excuse me for not having noticed you earlier, I'm not feeling quite myself. Why did you shout about the Godfather?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not really sure how to tell you this, your majesty... It seems as though you've fallen foul of a clever scheme of the Godfather's...

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: That's absurd, why would the Godfather want to hurt me?

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: I'm afraid it's true your majesty. You see nobody knew that the Godfather was with you when you fought the Tanglefoot...

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: But that's the point, I didn't fight the Tanglefoot. We had only just entered its lair and sensing the danger to itself, the Tanglefoot fled down a passage, then... blackness!

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: Then your majesty, I think it may be worse than I imagined. I suspect the Fairy Godfather attacked you from behind and left you for dead. He has taken over control of Zanaris whilst you were...er, ...sleeping. He

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: has enlisted the aid of orcs and other assorted ruffians, if any of your subjects dared to question him, they were assaulted. I very much suspect that if it wasn't for the quick thinking of Fairy Nuff here, you would be

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: dead! She fled here with you and as many of your loyal fairies as she could gather. We've been in hiding ever since, until this brave adventurer managed to awaken you.

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: I can't believe it!

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: He shan't get away with this, how do I get back to Zanaris? The Godfather shall answer for his crimes!

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: No! Stop your majesty!

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: Why, old friend?

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: The Godfather has recruited an army of villains, whilst we just have the few fairies who escaped and although they would gladly follow you into battle, many are still wounded from their treatment at the tyrant's hands. I

lines.speaker: Fairy Very Wise
lines.text: must counsel caution, lest this brave hero's efforts are all wasted and the godfather captures you. He won't let you survive a second time.

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: There is wisdom in what you say. I shall ponder your words before I act rashly. As for you, [player name], how can I reward you? You have done the fairy people a great favour that shall not be forgotten. I'm afraid

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: you find us in trying times, but please accept this magic lamp as a sign of our thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, but I don't have any space to carry it.

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: That's alright, come back and get it when you can.
